title: filago cretensis subsp. cretensis
intro: Filago cretensis subsp. cretensis, also known as the Cretan fleabane, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the island of Crete. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and flowers are said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Filago cretensis subsp. cretensis include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
